articles.title: Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto
articles.description: All parties are still optimistic that Clarity can happen before the midterms, but time is really starting to run out.

articles.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
articles.description: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

articles.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
articles.description: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

articles.title: Americans traded $571 million on Polymarket politic bets despite U.S. ban
articles.description: U.S.-linked wallets traded $571 million in political contracts over the past year, more than any other country, even though the platform legally cannot serve them. The money leans toward the foreign-conflict markets U.S. venues do not list.

articles.title: Banks have stopped asking if stablecoins belong in finance, now they're considering how
articles.description: Financial institutions are racing to become the secure gateways for stablecoins as digital asset volume is projected to explode by 2030.

articles.title: What is Bending Spoons? The little-known AOL and Vimeo owner that’s now public
articles.description: Bending Spoons remains largely unknown, even as its portfolio of products has served more than a billion people.

articles.title: Collateral, not yield, will decide which stablecoins win
articles.description: As yield-bearing stablecoins race toward a $50 billion market capitalization, the industry is optimizing for the wrong metric, argues Artem Tolkachev, chief RWA officer at Falcon Finance.

articles.title: Kalshi and prediction market sector embroiled in mixed bag of legal fights across U.S.
articles.description: Some of the many battles with state gaming regulators aren't going well for the industry at the moment, but it isn't without its would-be government protectors.

articles.title: Almost 90 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are
articles.description: With AI igniting an investor frenzy, more startups are achieving unicorn status every month.

articles.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
articles.description: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

articles.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
articles.description: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

articles.title: Barstool's Portnoy plans to hold bitcoin down to zero after timing it wrong every time
articles.description: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy said he will hold bitcoin all the way down to zero after buying near $100,000.
